description_long: This object depicts a distorted human figure with elongated and stretched limbs, giving it an abstract and surreal appearance. The head is relatively well-formed, with facial features and hair visible, but the body and limbs are unnaturally extended and twisted, merging into thin, ribbon-like structures. The figure appears to be wearing a form-fitting outfit, with the legs and arms blending into the surrounding geometry. The overall form is highly deformed, with parts of the body appearing to dissolve into angular, planar extensions. The asset lacks realistic anatomical proportions, making it appear more like a digital glitch or an abstract sculpture than a typical pedestrian. The visible surfaces are smooth, with some areas showing a slight sheen.
description: A highly distorted, abstract human figure with elongated limbs and a stretched, ribbon-like body, wearing a form-fitting outfit. The head is recognizable, but the rest of the body is deformed and merges into angular extensions.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are visible, with the body stretching into a long, thin, angular extension; the face and hair are most clearly seen from this angle.
description_view_1: The figure's limbs and body appear as thin, elongated ribbons extending outward, with minimal detail on the head; the abstract nature is most pronounced here.
description_view_2: The back of the head and upper body are visible, with the body and limbs dissolving into sharp, angular planes; the figure's posture is ambiguous.
description_view_3: The lower body and legs are stretched into long, thin forms, with the head partially visible; the abstract, planar extensions dominate the view.
